task: Audit whether the current repo's skills are duly described and duly implemented

evidence: Inspected repo skill contracts, docs, and install surfaces

risks: Discoverability may be weaker than implementation because repo docs list skill names without short descriptions
Repo verification relies on listSkills() and would not detect an unregistered new skill directory automatically
Ralph artifacts were stored in the repo because the intended .codex paths were not writable in this environment
